de: Die Straßen Venezuelas riechen nach Tod. en: The streets of Venezuela smell of death. While the number of 'good' news coming from the rubble decreased after the two earthquakes of 7.2 and 7.5 magnitudes that hit Venezuela consecutively last week, the 'smell of death' covered the streets of many cities, especially the capital Caracas.
la: Viae Venezuela odor mortis. Dum numerus "bonus" ex ruderibus oriens decrevit post duos terrae motus 7.2 et 7.5 magnitudines quae Venezuela proxime praeterito septimana feriunt, "odor mortis" vias multarum urbium, praesertim capitale Caracas, obtexit.
